full_story: High above the clouds, there once floated a beautiful town where colors were not just decoration but the very essence of life itself, glowing warmly in the golden light of morning as a small luminous creature named Lumi drifted gently through the air; but one day, something began to feel wrong as the vibrant reds, blues, and greens slowly started to fade, spreading like a silent wave until half the world turned gray, leaving Lumi confused and searching for answers. Guided by curiosity, Lumi entered a magical art hut where an ancient enchanted paintbrush revealed that the balance of the world was breaking and that the scattered fragments of the Color Core—the source of all color—needed to be restored; determined to help, Lumi set out on a journey across fading lands. In a quiet forest losing its green, Lumi comforted a frightened rabbit and released a glowing fragment that brought life rushing back into the trees and grass; in a pale desert that had forgotten warmth, Lumi found a joyful little sand creature and restored the golden glow of sunlight to the dunes; and atop a cold, gray mountain where even the sky had lost its blue, Lumi saved a struggling bird and returned the vast, vibrant sky to life. Carrying the gathered fragments, Lumi soared back to the floating town, where the pieces merged into a radiant Color Core that pulsed with energy, and as it stabilized, a brilliant wave of color spread across the entire world, reviving every corner in a breathtaking transformation. At last, the town shimmered brighter than ever before, full of movement and joy, and as the sun set in warm golden hues, Lumi floated peacefully, its glow steady and calm, quietly realizing that the world was whole again—and more beautiful than it had ever been.
